languages.text: El portador recupera +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} una vez por {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g} cuando dispara el primer disparo de un rifle voltaico o usa {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Detonación magnaaceleradora{/g} u {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Onda transónica{/g} por primera vez.

languages.text: Takan kişi, her {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} volt atım tüfeğiyle ilk kez atış yaptığında veya ilk kez {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnaray Patlaması{/g} ya da {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonik Dalga{/g} kullandığında +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP'sini{/g} geri kazanır.
languages.original_text: The wearer regains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} when they fire the first shot from an arc rifle or use {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} or {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonic Wave{/g} for the first time.

traits.locale_text: Takan kişi, her {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} volt atım tüfeğiyle ilk kez atış yaptığında veya ilk kez {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnaray Patlaması{/g} ya da {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonik Dalga{/g} kullandığında +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}EP'sini{/g} geri kazanır.

languages.text: 当装备者使用电弧步枪发射第一枪，或首次使用{g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}磁轨爆破{/g}或{g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}穿梭音波{/g}时，装备者恢复1点{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}。此效果每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}生效一次。
languages.original_text: The wearer regains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} when they fire the first shot from an arc rifle or use {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} or {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonic Wave{/g} for the first time.

traits.locale_text: 当装备者使用电弧步枪发射第一枪，或首次使用{g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}磁轨爆破{/g}或{g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}穿梭音波{/g}时，装备者恢复1点{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}行动点数{/g}。此效果每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}生效一次。

languages.text: L'utilisateur regagne +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} une fois par {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} lorsqu'il tire avec un électrofusil ou qu'il utilise {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Déflagration magnarail{/g} ou {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Onde transsonique{/g} pour la première fois.
languages.original_text: The wearer regains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} when they fire the first shot from an arc rifle or use {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Magnarail Blast{/g} or {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonic Wave{/g} for the first time.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur regagne +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}PA{/g} une fois par {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} lorsqu'il tire avec un électrofusil ou qu'il utilise {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Déflagration magnarail{/g} ou {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Onde transsonique{/g} pour la première fois.

languages.text: 弧状銃で最初の弾を発射したり、{g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}連射{/g}や{g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}超音波波{/g}を初めて使用した時には、1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}に一度、+1{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}を回復する。
languages.original_text: The wearer regains +1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} once per {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g} when they fire the first shot from an arc rifle or use {g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}Chain Discharge{/g} or {g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}Transonic Wave{/g} for the first time.

traits.locale_text: 弧状銃で最初の弾を発射したり、{g|f:2c4d692f28fe47e3a65f45a914c5189b}連射{/g}や{g|f:09c4605a50c74262aec197ec9f9a9d58}超音波波{/g}を初めて使用した時には、1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}に一度、+1{g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g}を回復する。
